title: Creating Mobile-Friendly Emails That Convert
author: Kevin Chen
excerpt: With over 60% of emails opened on mobile devices, mastering mobile email design is essential for campaign success.
content:
Mobile email design isn't a nice-to-have—it's a necessity. With the majority of emails now opened on smartphones and tablets, your messages must look great and function perfectly on any screen. This guide covers everything you need to create mobile-friendly emails that convert.

Mobile-optimized emails see a 15% increase in click-through rates compared to non-optimized emails.

Mobile Email Design Principles

Mobile users have different needs than desktop users. They typically have less time, smaller screens, and are often on the go. Design with these constraints in mind.

Key Mobile Optimization Strategies

Responsive Design

Use fluid templates that adapt to any screen size automatically.

Touch-Friendly CTAs

Make buttons large enough to tap easily—at least 44x44 pixels.

Concise Content

Keep messages short and scannable on small screens.

Optimized Images

Use compressed images and specify alt text for slow connections.

Testing Your Mobile Emails

Always test your emails on multiple devices and email clients before sending. Use preview tools that simulate different screen sizes and render engines.

Laravel Mail's email builder includes mobile preview and testing features to ensure your emails look great everywhere.

Don't forget to optimize your landing pages for mobile too—the email is only half the battle.

Common Mobile Mistakes

Avoid tiny fonts, horizontal scrolling, and complex tables that break on small screens. Never use fixed-width layouts, and always include a desktop-friendly version for those who want it.

Create perfect mobile emails with Laravel Mail.
